rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a footnote that lists prior work on uniqueness and WOM and briefly summarizes its result that high-uniqueness consumers may refrain from WOM. The citing paper's core theory and estimation are at the brand-characteristic level and do not operationalize or test the cited paper's need-for-uniqueness mechanism. There is no direct method, measure, or hypothesis carryover tied specifically to this citation beyond background positioning.
